name: rad-docker
description: RAD Docker — comprehensive Dockerfile best practices, multi-stage build patterns for Node.js and Next.js, security hardening, image optimization, and anti-pattern enforcement for production container images. Covers the 'build fat, ship thin' mental model, base image selection, layer caching, secret management via BuildKit, non-root execution, health checks, graceful shutdown, and the PID 1 problem. Built from curated Docker optimization sources.
